channel.title: mcp Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the mcp codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: GraphCache Class — mcp Architecture
item.description: Architecture documentation for the GraphCache class in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.

item.title: Server Class — mcp Architecture
item.description: Architecture documentation for the Server class in server.ts from the mcp codebase.

item.title: AnalysisTools Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: The logic specific to different code exploration strategies, including symbol lookup, call-graph traversal, and architectural overviews. Architectural overview of the AnalysisTools domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 6 source files.

item.title: GraphCache Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: A specialized LRU and disk-based caching system for storing indexed representations of codebases to ensure sub-second tool responses. Architectural overview of the GraphCache domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: McpServer Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: The entry point and orchestration layer that implements the Model Context Protocol to expose code analysis tools to AI clients. Architectural overview of the McpServer domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 5 source files.

item.title: RepositoryUtility Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: Handles raw filesystem operations and repository preparation for remote analysis. Architectural overview of the RepositoryUtility domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 4 source files.

item.title: ArchiveManager — mcp Architecture
item.description: Recursive directory walker for ZIP creation with standard exclusions Architecture documentation for the ArchiveManager subdomain (part of RepositoryUtility domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: CallGraphTraversal — mcp Architecture
item.description: BFS logic for navigating caller/callee relationships across domains Architecture documentation for the CallGraphTraversal subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ErrorClassifier — mcp Architecture
item.description: Maps HTTP and Network errors to domain-specific structured errors Architecture documentation for the ErrorClassifier subdomain (part of RepositoryUtility domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: IdentityGenerator — mcp Architecture
item.description: Calculates SHA1 hashes of paths and git status for caching Architecture documentation for the IdentityGenerator subdomain (part of RepositoryUtility domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: OverviewRenderer — mcp Architecture
item.description: Generates high-level architectural summaries from domain indexes Architecture documentation for the OverviewRenderer subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: PersistenceManager — mcp Architecture
item.description: Handles file-system I/O for .json cache files Architecture documentation for the PersistenceManager subdomain (part of GraphCache domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SessionContext — mcp Architecture
item.description: Manages request-scoped data like the current working directory Architecture documentation for the SessionContext subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SymbolFinder — mcp Architecture
item.description: Logic for resolving Class.method and partial name matches Architecture documentation for the SymbolFinder subdomain (part of AnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ToolRegistration — mcp Architecture
item.description: Maps internal handlers to MCP tool definitions Architecture documentation for the ToolRegistration subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: TransportLayer — mcp Architecture
item.description: Handles Stdio communication with the host application Architecture documentation for the TransportLayer subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
